navbar.label: Global Navigation Bar
navbar.description: Persistent top bar — brand blue (#0079bf), 44px height. Always visible.

entity-menu.name: Entity Menu
entity-menu.description: 3-dot icon button → dropdown with actions. Used on every entity (list, card, board). Dropdown appears below-right of the trigger. Always includes: edit, archive/delete. Destructive actions are red text with confirm dialog.

confirm-dialog.name: Confirm Dialog
confirm-dialog.description: Browser native confirm() for destructive actions. Message describes what will be destroyed. OK = proceed, Cancel = abort. Used for: delete board, delete list, delete card, remove member.

inline-edit.name: Inline Edit
inline-edit.description: Click text to edit in-place. Text becomes an input/textarea with blue ring. Enter or blur saves, Escape cancels. Used for: list title, card title, board title.

interactions.description: Click text to enter edit mode

sidebar-panel.name: Sidebar Panel
sidebar-panel.description: Slides in from the right, 320px wide on desktop, full-screen on mobile. Has a header with title + close button. Used for: board settings, activity feed. NOT a separate page — overlays the current content.

interactions.description: Close button or click outside dismisses

card-modal.name: Card Detail Modal
card-modal.description: Centered modal overlay (max-width 768px desktop, full-screen mobile). Dark backdrop. Shows card title, description, labels, checklists, comments, attachments, activity. Sidebar on the right with action buttons. NOT a page navigation — URL does not change.

interactions.description: Click backdrop or X button closes

login-form.label: Login Form
login-form.description: Email + password fields, submit button, link to signup

boards-sidebar.label: Boards Sidebar
boards-sidebar.description: Left sidebar with: Boards link (active), Templates link, Recently Viewed boards, Workspaces list. Persistent on desktop, slide-out drawer on mobile.

sidebar-recent.label: Recently Viewed
sidebar-recent.description: Last 5 visited boards with color swatch + title

sidebar-workspaces.label: Workspaces
sidebar-workspaces.description: List of user's workspaces, each expandable to show Boards + Settings links. + button to create workspace.

boards-main.label: Boards Content
boards-main.description: Main content area showing board grids organized by section

starred-section.label: Starred Boards
starred-section.description: Grid of starred boards. Star icon + heading. Only shown if user has starred boards.

workspace-sections.label: Workspace Boards
workspace-sections.description: One section per workspace. Workspace name as heading (link to workspace page). Grid of boards in that workspace + Create Board button.

personal-section.label: Your Boards
personal-section.description: Boards not assigned to any workspace. User icon + 'Your boards' heading. Grid of boards + Create Board button.

shared-section.label: Shared with you
shared-section.description: Boards where user is a member but not the owner. Only shown if any exist.

closed-section.label: Closed Boards
closed-section.description: Collapsible section at the bottom. Collapsed by default. Click to expand and lazy-load closed boards. Each has Reopen and Delete buttons.

board.title: Board View
board.description: The main board view — kanban columns with cards. Board background fills the entire viewport below the navbar.

board-header.label: Board Header
board-header.description: Semi-transparent bar over the board background. Contains: board title (inline-editable), star toggle, visibility badge, view tabs (Board/Table/Calendar/Timeline), member avatars, invite button, settings trigger (3-dot).

board-visibility.label: Visibility Badge
board-visibility.description: Shows lock icon + 'Private' or globe + 'Public' or building + 'Workspace'

board-view-tabs.label: View Switcher
board-view-tabs.description: Tabs: Board (default), Table, Calendar, Timeline. Each navigates to a sub-route.

board-members.label: Member Avatars
board-members.description: Row of circular avatars showing board members. Overflow shows +N count.

board-settings-panel.label: Board Settings
board-settings-panel.description: Slides in from right. Tabs: Settings, Activity. Settings tab has: visibility dropdown, background picker, members section, danger zone (close board, delete board). Activity tab shows the board activity feed.

board-filter-bar.label: Filter Bar
board-filter-bar.description: Below the board header. Three filter dropdowns: Labels (multi-select), Members (multi-select), Due Date (overdue/soon/none). Clear button. Cards not matching are dimmed.

board-columns.label: Board Columns
board-columns.description: Horizontal scrolling container of list columns. Each column is 272px wide. Columns are drag-droppable to reorder. Cards within columns are drag-droppable between columns.

board-list.label: List Column
board-list.description: 272px wide, rounded corners, gray background (#ebecf0). Header: list title (inline-editable) + 3-dot menu (archive, copy, delete). Body: vertical stack of card items. Footer: Add Card button.

list-menu.label: List Menu
list-menu.description: Dropdown: Copy list, Archive list, Delete list (red, with confirm)

list-cards.label: Card Stack
list-cards.description: Vertical stack of card items, 8px gap. Drag-drop enabled. Min-height for empty drop zone.

list-add-card.label: Add a card
list-add-card.description: Click opens inline form: textarea + Add Card button + Cancel. Not a modal — replaces the button in-place.

board-add-list.label: Add another list
board-add-list.description: At the end of the columns. Semi-transparent white button. Click opens inline form: input + Add List button + Cancel. Same width as list columns (272px).

card-detail.title: Card Detail
card-detail.description: NOT a page — this is a modal overlay triggered by clicking a card. URL does not change. Described as a page entry for completeness.

card-modal-overlay.label: Card Modal
card-modal-overlay.description: Two-column layout inside the modal. Left (main): cover, title, labels, description, checklists, comments. Right (sidebar): action buttons (Members, Labels, Due Date, Cover, Move, Copy, Archive, Delete).

card-cover.label: Card Cover
card-cover.description: Color strip or image at the top of the modal. 80px height.

card-header.label: Card Header
card-header.description: Card icon + title (inline-editable) + breadcrumb showing 'in list: ListName'

card-labels.label: Labels
card-labels.description: Row of colored label pills with names. + button opens label picker popover.

card-members.label: Members
card-members.description: Row of member avatars. + button opens member picker popover.

card-description.label: Description
card-description.description: Markdown-rendered description. Click to edit (textarea). Renders with react-markdown.

card-checklists.label: Checklists
card-checklists.description: List of checklists. Each has title + progress bar + items. Items have checkbox + title (inline-editable). Add Checklist button at the bottom.

card-attachments.label: Attachments
card-attachments.description: List of attachments with name, URL, delete button.

card-comments.label: Comments
card-comments.description: Comment input (textarea with @mention autocomplete) + list of comments in reverse chronological order. Each comment: avatar, name, timestamp, markdown-rendered text, edit/delete buttons (author or admin).

card-actions-sidebar.label: Card Actions
card-actions-sidebar.description: Right sidebar (desktop) or footer (mobile) with action buttons: Members, Labels, Due Date, Cover, Move, Copy, Archive, Delete (red).
